Package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller

package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray
    Base package of Application Starter app.
    edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel
     
  • Class
    Description
    AddBatchDialogFragment
    Dialog fragment that collects user input for creating a new incubation batch.
    AddIncubatorDialogFragment
    Dialog fragment used to create or edit an incubator record.
    BatchAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying batch card summaries in a list.
    BatchAdapter.OnBatchClickListener
    Functional interface for handling batch item click events.
    BatchAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for displaying a batch card summary.
    BatchDetailFragment
    Fragment that displays detailed information about a single batch.
    BatchListFragment
    Manages the list of incubation batches shown on the home screen.
    BulkCandlingDialogFragment
    Dialog fragment that applies bulk candling results to all egg groups in a batch.
    BulkCandlingGroupAdapter
    Adapter used to display egg groups and collect bulk candling input values.
    BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.OnInputFocusListener
    Listener notified when an input field should receive focus and show the keyboard.
    DatePickerFragment
    Dialog fragment that displays a date picker.
    EggDetailFragment
    Fragment intended to display details for a single egg.
    IncubatorAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying incubator items in a list.
    IncubatorAdapter.OnIncubatorClickListener
    Functional interface for handling incubator item click events.
    IncubatorAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for displaying an incubator item.
    IncubatorsFragment
    Fragment that displays the list of active incubators.
    MainActivity
    Main activity hosting the application's navigation graph and top-level UI.
    SettingsFragment
    Preference screen for application settings and account actions.
    SignInFragment
    Fragment that handles user authentication with Google Sign-In.
